name: Improper Neutralization of Trailing Special Elements
description: The product does not properly neutralize trailing special characters in user input (e.g., trailing dots stripped by Windows, trailing slashes, trailing spaces), allowing attackers to bypass path-based or name-based access controls.
detection_pattern: INGRESS node provides data with trailing special characters that flows to CONTROL[name_check] or STORAGE[file_access] without a TRANSFORM[trailing_strip] that removes or normalizes trailing special elements before comparison or access
